title: NYT says Trump admin subpoenas journalists over Air Force One reports
shortDescription: The media organization said subpoenas were issued July 10 asking that the journalists appear before a grand jury.

title: Former Overstock CEO ordered to pay Hunter Biden $1.7M damages
shortDescription: Hunter Biden was awarded $1.7 million in damages after a judge ruled former Overstock CEO Patrick Byrne defamed him with false Iran bribery claims.

title: Iran, Trump trade threats as peace deal fails
shortDescription: President Trump issued a stark threat to Iran after hostilities resumed this week, with Iranian leaders claiming the U.S. violated the agreement.

title: Landmark housing bill becomes law without Trump's signature
shortDescription: President Trump allowed a bipartisan housing bill to become law without his signature after refusing to sign it in protest over an unrelated voting bill.

title: Trump warns of 'communists,' but here's what democratic socialists are
shortDescription: Democratic socialists like AOC and Zohran Mamdani have made inroads in some cities. Republicans call them communists but the ideologies differ.

title: Senate battle brews to shield special education from RFK Jr.'s health agency
shortDescription: In a private call, education officials told the disability community that families have nothing to fear about HHS's new role. Some weren't satisfied.

title: Graham Platner officially withdraws from race for Maine US Senate seat
shortDescription: The Maine Secretary of State's Office confirmed they had received Platner's notice that he was withdrawing from the race.

title: Eric Trump comments raise questions about future of Air Force One jets
shortDescription: President Trump has said his Qatar-gifted Air Force One will later go to his presidential library. Eric Trump says a different plane will go there.

title: Watch man in bong costume freestyle at New Jersey committee meeting
shortDescription: Dressed in a purple bong costume, a man who identified himself as "Bong Holeo," freestyled during a New Jersey committee meeting on July 7.

title: Democrats slam Trump on housing bill stance
shortDescription: Democrats criticize President Trump after he refuses to sign a major housing bill that will still become law without his signature.

title: White House issues scathing report on iconic museum. We went there.
shortDescription: A White House report accused the National Museum of American History of promoting a "radical, activist ideology." Historians largely disagree.

title: Tennessee bridge renamed after Donald Trump same day as Florida airport
shortDescription: President Donald J. Trump is now the name on a bridge in Tennessee and an airport in Florida. Trump family members celebrated both milestones.
